description_long: This object is a rectangular, upright carton with a light blue and white color scheme, featuring a screw-on cap at the top. The front panel displays the name 'DANIEL HENRIQUE LEAL' in bold white letters, along with a windmill illustration and additional text in smaller fonts. The sides and back of the carton are covered with various text blocks, including professional history, educational background, and a QR code, as well as a small portrait photo. The top of the carton is flat with a blue plastic cap positioned near one corner, and the overall design is clean and modern with graphic elements such as waves and geometric shapes. The carton appears to be made primarily of coated paperboard with a plastic cap, typical for liquid or lotion packaging. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, with clear, legible graphics and a sturdy, boxy form.
description: A rectangular blue and white carton with a screw-on blue cap, featuring bold text, a windmill graphic, and detailed informational panels on all sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main label with 'DANIEL HENRIQUE LEAL', a windmill illustration, and a blue cap on top.
description_view_1: This side displays educational and professional history text, a badge-like graphic, and the blue cap from a different angle.
description_view_2: The back view features a portrait photo, more detailed text, a QR code, and recycling symbols.
description_view_3: This side shows a hexagonal badge graphic, icons, and a blank form area, with the cap visible on top.
